testcase.name: test_admin_login

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: No token in admin response: {'success': True, 'requires_2fa': False, 'admin_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyXzVlOTgxOGI2ODk5NyIsInVzZXJfaWQiOiJ1c2VyXzVlOTgxOGI2ODk5NyIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTEyNzA5NH0.Sa4mZeouwNT197V1s806NHapSTTo4PzDXBlwKnayNuQ', 'admin': {'admin_id': 'admin_450d1ca5c5c3', 'user_id': 'user_5e9818b68997', 'email': 'blendlinknet@gmail.com', 'name': 'Blendlink Admin', 'role': 'super_admin', 'permissions': {'view_users': True, 'edit_users': True, 'suspend_users': True, 'ban_users': True, 'delete_users': True, 'reset_user_passwords': True, 'force_logout_users': True, 'view_balances': True, 'adjust_bl_coins': True, 'adjust_usd_balance': True, 'view_transactions': True, 'approve_withdrawals': True, 'reject_withdrawals': True, 'adjust_commissions': True, 'view_genealogy': True, 'edit_genealogy': True, 'reassign_downlines': True, 'manage_orphans': True, 'view_public_content': True, 'view_private_content': True, 'delete_content': True, 'restore_content': True, 'manage_reports': True, 'manage_themes': True, 'manage_pages': True, 'manage_settings': True, 'view_admins': True, 'create_admins': True, 'edit_admins': True, 'delete_admins': True, 'manage_permissions': True, 'view_audit_logs': True, 'view_analytics': True, 'view_system_health': True, 'use_ai_assistant': True}, 'totp_enabled': False}, 'message': 'Login successful'} assert 'token' in {'admin': {'admin_id': 'admin_450d1ca5c5c3', 'email': 'blendlinknet@gmail.com', 'name': 'Blendlink Admin', 'permissions': {'adjust_bl_coins': True, 'adjust_commissions': True, 'adjust_usd_balance': True, 'approve_withdrawals': True, ...}, ...}, 'admin_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyXzVlOTgxOGI2ODk5NyIsInVzZXJfaWQiOiJ1c2VyXzVlOTgxOGI2ODk5NyIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTEyNzA5NH0.Sa4mZeouwNT197V1s806NHapSTTo4PzDXBlwKnayNuQ', 'message': 'Login successful', 'requires_2fa': False, ...}"

testcase.name: test_subscription_tiers_returns_all_four_tiers

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing tier: bronze. Available: ['tiers', 'ranked_tiers'] assert 'bronze' in ['tiers', 'ranked_tiers']

testcase.failure: tests/test_blendlink_live_stripe_iteration159.py:230: in test_subscription_tiers_returns_all_four_tiers assert tier in tiers_lower, f"Missing tier: {tier}. Available: {tiers}" E AssertionError: Missing tier: bronze. Available: ['tiers', 'ranked_tiers'] E assert 'bronze' in ['tiers', 'ranked_tiers']

testcase.name: test_my_listings_route
testcase.failure: tests/test_blendlink_live_stripe_iteration159.py:256: in test_my_listings_route assert response.status_code == 200, f"My listings route failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: My listings route failed: {"detail":"Listing not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_balance
testcase.failure: tests/test_blendlink_live_stripe_iteration159.py:296: in test_user_balance assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get user failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get user failed: {"detail":"User not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_dashboard
testcase.failure: tests/test_blendlink_live_stripe_iteration159.py:337: in test_admin_dashboard assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin dashboard failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin dashboard failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_push_notification_service_initialized

failure.message: AssertionError: Push route not found: 405 assert 405 in [401, 403, 422] + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_blendlink_live_stripe_iteration159.py:353: in test_push_notification_service_initialized assert response.status_code in [401, 403, 422], f"Push route not found: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Push route not found: 405 E assert 405 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
